---
name: Framework Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to the meta-agent pattern, auditor, feedback loop, or architecture
title: "[Framework] "
labels: framework
---

## Component

What part of the framework does this affect? (meta-agent, auditor, constitution pattern, feedback loop, eval tracking, etc.)

## Current Behavior

How does it work now?

## Proposed Improvement

What should change and why?

## Evidence

How did you discover this? Real-world use, thought experiment, or research?

## Trade-offs

What are the downsides or risks of this change?
